source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for expressive English brand UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for confident Japanese headlines, labels, and campaign data.
layout: Layered 8px grids, radial petal grouping, compact brand cards, confident shadows, and structured campaign surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent dahlia bloom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Dahlia transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a cut flower garden dahlia bloom botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A layered dahlia bloom with many precise radial burgundy petals, peach-gold inner petal highlights, warm golden center details, leaf-green calyx and short stem, and deep wine shadows between petal layers. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, dense geometric rosette identity, no rose, no protea.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full bloom face, calyx, and short stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no rose spiral, no protea bracts, no magnolia blossom, no bouquet, no vase, no garden scene, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dahlia light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Dahlia", derived from the visible cut flower garden dahlia bloom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible layered brand system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dahlia, Dahlia Bloom, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from burgundy petal layers, peach-gold highlights, golden center points, leaf-green stem, soft apricot surfaces, and wine-shadow depth. The board must read as dahlia, not rose, protea, magnolia, or generic burgundy brand kit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, campaign navigation, brand dashboard metric cards, funnel chart, content table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, petal-paper surfaces, dahlia-burgundy primary actions, petal-peach secondary controls, center-gold highlights, leaf-green status accents, radial petal texture, layered cards.
Constraints: no rose spiral, no protea bracts, no magnolia cream palette, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Dahlia", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dahlia dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Dahlia". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible cut flower garden dahlia bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dahlia, Dahlia Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the dahlia system language: burgundy-ink dark backgrounds, soft petal text, dahlia-burgundy active states, petal-peach secondary controls, center-gold chart highlights, leaf-green success, radial petal texture, layered 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as dahlia, not rose, protea, magnolia, or generic burgundy brand kit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, campaign navigation, brand dashboard metric cards, funnel chart, content table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: burgundy-ink and wine-shadow surfaces, petal-paper foreground, dahlia-burgundy controls, center-gold highlights, leaf-green status, petal-peach accents, subtle radial petal overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no rose spiral, no protea bracts, no magnolia cream palette, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Dahlia".
